subcodes.first_line: O true friends, render thanks that in the Day when the Sun of the horizons shed forth its rays of compassion, ye became [the manifestations thereof] and were honored [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی حمد کنید که در یوم اشراق مظاهر اشفاق نیر آفاق گشتید و بشرف
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
